description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after the character Yoshi from the Super Mario franchise, crafted to resemble a hand-knitted or crocheted figure. The toy features a predominantly green body with a white underbelly, large round eyes with black pupils, and a prominent round snout. Its feet are brown with yellow soles, and it has red spikes running down its back and a red saddle-like patch on its lower back. The surface texture is visibly knitted, giving it a soft, tactile appearance. The toy is compact and rounded, with short limbs and a tail, and is designed to be endearing and huggable.
description: A hand-knitted plush Yoshi toy with a green body, white belly, red back spikes, and brown feet, featuring large expressive eyes and a soft, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing Yoshi's face, large eyes, snout, and both feet clearly visible.
description_view_1: Three-quarter front view highlighting the side of the snout, one eye, and the red back spikes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red spikes, tail, and the back of the head and body.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the profile of the head, snout, and the alignment of the back spikes and tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a slight upward curve to the mouth, giving a welcoming and playful appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with legs bent forward, arms resting at the sides, and head facing forward.
